chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1309 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02-10-2025 Mr. Shoukat Ali Makwal, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner files a statement, which is taken on record; however, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
